content.text: Generate an image of a vintage radio on a wooden desk, then write Python that uses Pillow to add a sepia filter (assume the image is loaded as `img`).

tools_available.name: image_gen
tools_available.description: Generate an image from a text prompt. Returns image URL plus short caption.

tools_available.description: Execute Python 3 code in a sandbox. Returns stdout, stderr, and exit code.
